nodes.label: Four Governing Principles
nodes.rationale: README makes temporal non-leakage, quantitative rigor, high-performance processing, and MBO-only data non-negotiable.

nodes.label: Zero Temporal Leakage
nodes.rationale: Every calculation must be point-in-time, walk-forward/purged/embargoed, and fit-on-past only.

nodes.label: Quantitative And Scientific Rigor
nodes.rationale: Mathematical definitions, unit/property tests, OOS validation, statistical significance, and determinism are required.

nodes.label: High Performance Columnar Processing
nodes.rationale: Hot paths should be vectorized/columnar with Parquet/Arrow and streaming slices for large MBO data.

nodes.label: MBO Only Source Of Truth
nodes.rationale: All higher layers derive from raw MBO/order-book reconstruction rather than external aggregate data.

nodes.label: Causal Order By event_ts And sequence
nodes.rationale: The contract states legal causal ordering is event_ts plus sequence.
nodes.norm_label: causal order by event_ts and sequence
